bottleneck_evidence_logs: [2024-02-05 09:05:30] Muthu: Morning geng! Sales hari ni on fire! Banyak order masuk semalam punya. Kongsi Raya punya pasal!
[2024-02-05 09:20:05] Kak Yah: Betul Farhan. Kepala dah pening ni. Banyak sangat order.
[2024-02-05 09:28:15] Muthu: Boss, sales cun. Order manyak. Cuma delivery kena push lagi. Warehouse tengah bottleneck sikit.
[2024-02-05 09:30:50] Farhan: Boss, bukan bottleneck sikit. Ini bottleneck besar giler. Waybill tak keluar, barang tak gerak.
[2024-02-05 09:33:20] Kak Yah: Boss, saya tengah buat sehabis baik ni. Waybill J&T memang kena manual enter satu-satu.
[2024-02-05 09:38:10] Farhan: Boss, gua takleh tolong key-in, gua kena packing. Kalau tak packing, lagi lambat.
[2024-02-05 09:46:00] Farhan: J&T Van dah sampai ke belum ni? Ada banyak barang dah ready pick up tapi takde tracking number.
[2024-02-05 09:48:30] Kak Yah: Kejap Farhan, driver J&T cakap dia otw. Dia pun lambat sebab banyak pickup tempat lain.
[2024-02-05 10:30:15] Farhan: Boss, J&T van dah datang tapi dia nak 30 minit je. Barang kita banyak gila ni, takkan sempat.
[2024-02-05 11:03:00] Muthu: Aiyo, datang balik? Bila pulak? Customer Budi dah bising-bising. Dia order keropok lekor banyak.
[2024-02-05 12:33:15] Kak Yah: Boss, pagi ni sempat 80 parcel je. Banyak lagi ni. Pening dah kepala.
[2024-02-05 14:18:00] Farhan: Walao eh! Cancel order? Dah penat packing ni. Kak Yah, lu boleh ke?
[2024-02-05 14:20:45] Kak Yah: Aduh, Muthu, janganlah cakap macam tu. Tengah key-in ni, nanti lagi lambat. Order Lim tu besar, kena double check.
[2024-02-05 15:35:40] Farhan: Boss, barang makin bertimbun. Courier Ninja Van pulak cakap dia lambat nak datang. Pukul 5 baru sampai kot.
[2024-02-05 15:38:15] Muthu: Ninja Van lambat? Aiyo, this is bad, wei! We promise customer today!
[2024-02-05 17:00:00] Kak Yah: Ninja Van dah sampai! Cepat Farhan! Banyak barang nak kena scan ni.
[2024-02-05 20:15:00] Farhan: Muthu, jom lepak mamak Hakim. Penat gila siot harini.
